input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find NFL Wild Card Saturday results (Rams@Panthers, Chargers@Patriots?)
with open('articles/2026/01/10/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        for kw in ['Rams', 'Panthers', 'Chargers', 'Patriots', 'Wild Card', 'playoff', 'Bears', 'Packers']:
            if kw in title:
                print(title[:140])
                break
" | head -15
input.description: Find NFL Wild Card Saturday results

input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Find AFCON Algeria vs Nigeria QF result
with open('articles/2026/01/10/articles.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = a.get('title','') or ''
        if ('Algeria' in title and 'Nigeria' in title) or ('AFCON' in title and ('quarterfinal' in title.lower() or 'semi' in title.lower())):
            print(title[:140])
" | head -10
